---
title: "Where am I located?"
---

```{=html}

<div class="contact-container">

  <div id="map"></div>

  <div class="location-image">
    <img src="assets/location.jpg" alt="Research station aerial view">
  </div>

</div>

<script>
  const map = L.map('map').setView([30.245355, -92.3486094], 13);

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors'
  }).addTo(map);

  L.marker([30.245355, -92.3486094])
    .addTo(map)
    .bindPopup('I am here');
</script>


```
